data.narrative:
Kreios Space is a seed-stage space and aerospace company that has raised €8M to date. The comparable universe spans 5 public companies (RKLB, PL, LUNR, ASTS, SATL) and 8 private peers including SpaceX, Rocket Lab, Blue Origin, Planet Labs, and Firefly Aerospace, though a narrow same-stage peer set is sparse within the sector.

Two standard valuation methods cannot be applied with available data. Peer-median analysis fails due to insufficient same-stage comparables in Space & Aerospace—only 0 same-stage matches, 1 adjacent-stage, and 0 similar-tier companies were identified from a universe of 23 same-sector peers, falling below the minimum 3-datapoint threshold needed for reliable triangulation. Public-comp anchoring is also inapplicable because Kreios Space's revenue figure is not on file; without it, the public sector P/S median of 53.2x across the 6 public tickers cannot be applied meaningfully.

Given these constraints, a conventional triangulated valuation range cannot be derived from the available data. Valuation of Kreios Space would require either (1) disclosure of the company's revenue run-rate, (2) identification of additional seed-stage aerospace comparables with disclosed valuations, or (3) alternative methods such as venture-backed cost-of-capital or milestone-based analysis. Key uncertainty remains the company's current market position relative to the broader ecosystem of private aerospace developers at equivalent maturity.
